title: Preparation of total cell lysates
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"at0ii","text":"This protocol outlines a step-by-step method for preparing cell lysates.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"adrlp","text":"Follow institutional guidelines for the disposal of biological and chemical waste.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"5qavi","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"15fem","text":"Dulbecco's Phosphate Buffered Saline without calcium chloride and magnesium chloride (DPBS) (Cat# 14190144, GIBCO)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c8mdd","text":"TrypLE (Cat# 12604021, GIBCO)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5dccf","text":"RIPA lysis and extraction buffer (Cat# 89901, Thermo Fisher)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b8506","text":"SigmaFastTM Protease Inhibitor Cocktail (Cat# S8830, Sigma)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":9,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e14kq","text":"Pierce BCA protein assay kit (Cat# 23225, Thermo Fisher)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"46th8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b29ab","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"26edi","text":"Centrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Seed cells into a 10 cm dish at a density appropriate to achieve 70–80% confluence by the following day. Allow the cells to attach and grow for approximately 24:00:00 .
Add RIPA lysis buffer (supplemented with protease inhibitors).
Incubate for at least 00:30:00 On ice , or alternatively store at -20°C until further processing.
Centrifuge 15000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes to pellet DNA and non-solubilized material.
Determine protein concentration via BCA assay.
creator: Sarah van Veen
